purpose: Defines the governed page modules, proof minimums, caveat signals, source modules, revision types, and next operations for web-native executive intelligence assets.
guardrails: Every executive asset page must declare its source modules and proof contract before visual rendering.
Slide-level polish cannot hide missing evidence, source caveats, simulated data, or blocked overclaims.
Treatment pages must remain options to consider or paths to test until human review is complete.
Source readiness and export posture must remain visible before any artifact is circulated.

assetDefinitions.sourcePrompt: Build me a CMO-ready read. Focus on whether we are actually strong or just big, what the risk is, and what we should do next.
assetDefinitions.summary: Full executive intelligence asset that turns the current BBE/Growth Navigator packet into a governed CMO read with proof, caveats, treatment paths, and source-owner next proof.
assetDefinitions.decisionSupported: Decide how leadership should read the brand now, what the current packet proves, where proof is still gated, and what paths are worth testing next.

assetDefinitions.sourcePrompt: Create a CMO-grade read of the primary MDS dashboard, with source-chart lineage and proof caveats visible.
assetDefinitions.summary: Source-chart replacement asset for the core MDS dashboard read: what the chart says, what it proves, what it does not prove, and what source-owner reconciliation is still needed.
assetDefinitions.decisionSupported: Decide what the core MDS dashboard proves, what it does not prove, and what source-owner reconciliation is needed before deck replacement.

assetDefinitions.sourcePrompt: Create a CMO-grade explainer for Momentum, Ahead/Behind, and category context so the read does not overclaim brand strength.
assetDefinitions.summary: Explains the benchmark hierarchy from the PPTX and Kate feedback: Momentum is the headline verdict, Ahead/Behind is the size-adjusted check, and category index is context.
assetDefinitions.decisionSupported: Align leadership on how to interpret Momentum, Ahead/Behind, and category context before the brand read turns into generic strength language.

assetDefinitions.sourcePrompt: Create a CMO-grade category position read that explains where the brand stands without treating category index as health proof.
assetDefinitions.summary: Answers where the brand stands in the category while preserving peer-basis caveats and reconnecting scale context to Momentum and driver support.
assetDefinitions.decisionSupported: Decide how to describe category position while keeping scale, peer basis, Momentum, and driver support separate.

benchmark_lens_read.title: Category Position Logic
benchmark_lens_read.role: Show category position as context while keeping Momentum and Ahead/Behind separate from raw scale.

assetDefinitions.sourcePrompt: Create a CMO-grade Momentum over time read that explains trajectory, urgency, significance caveats, and next proof.
assetDefinitions.summary: Focuses leadership on trajectory and urgency: whether the brand is building, holding, or losing strength over time, with movement/significance limits visible.
assetDefinitions.decisionSupported: Decide whether the brand is building, holding, or losing strength over time and what proof is needed before calling the trajectory durable.
askPrompts: What would make this read wrong?

benchmark_lens_read.title: Momentum Over Time Read
benchmark_lens_read.role: Focus leadership on trajectory and proof needs before claiming the brand is building strength over time.

assetDefinitions.sourcePrompt: Create a CMO-grade driver relationship map showing how Meaningful, Different, Salient, Demand Power, and Perceived Value work together.
assetDefinitions.summary: Shows why the diagnosis is not one isolated metric: Demand Power is read with Meaningful and Salient; Perceived Value is read with Meaningful and Different.
assetDefinitions.decisionSupported: Decide which driver tension matters most and which treatment path should be inspected first.

assetDefinitions.sourcePrompt: Create a CMO-grade Perceived Value guardrail asset that preserves Pricing Power source lineage without turning it into SKU-level pricing guidance.
assetDefinitions.summary: Explains what Pricing Power / Perceived Value can and cannot support: broad brand-equity price justification, not SKU/store/promo pricing action.
assetDefinitions.decisionSupported: Decide how to discuss value perception safely while blocking SKU-level price, pack architecture, and promotion optimization overclaims.

driver_diagnosis.title: Perceived Value Guardrail
driver_diagnosis.headline: Perceived Value is brand-equity value perception, not SKU-level pricing guidance.
driver_diagnosis.role: Show what the source metric can support, preserve Pricing Power lineage, and block pricing-action overclaims.

assetDefinitions.sourcePrompt: Create a CMO-grade Brand Jobs To Be Done asset that turns the diagnostic read into questions and paths to test.
assetDefinitions.summary: Bridges diagnosis to action by turning the read into testable brand jobs, leadership questions, and proof requirements rather than final commands.
assetDefinitions.decisionSupported: Decide which brand jobs the team should explore next and what evidence must be inspected before action.

assetDefinitions.sourcePrompt: Create a CMO-grade demographic diagnostic boundary that shows what can be answered now and what needs official cuts.
assetDefinitions.summary: Answers demographic-performance questions honestly by separating measured availability, simulated workflow data, missing cuts, base-size needs, and pilot replacement work.
assetDefinitions.decisionSupported: Answer demographic-performance questions honestly by separating workflow demonstration, measured evidence, and pilot replacement work.

assetDefinitions.sourcePrompt: Create a CMO-grade leadership question stack with evidence to use, evidence still needed, and source-owner asks.
assetDefinitions.summary: Turns the deck into governed leadership questions and source-owner asks so the asset ends with better decisions, not generic brainstorming.
assetDefinitions.decisionSupported: End the read with better leadership questions and source-owner asks, not generic brainstorming.

moduleDefinitions.title: Executive Verdict
moduleDefinitions.outputModeRationale: A Kate-calibrated product interpretation of the current BBE/Growth Navigator packet, not a verbatim deck slide.

moduleDefinitions.title: Benchmark Lens Read
moduleDefinitions.outputModeRationale: Applies current-state deck doctrine and Kate feedback to explain how Momentum, Ahead/Behind, and category context should be interpreted.

moduleDefinitions.title: Primary Chart Read
moduleDefinitions.outputModeRationale: Recreates and explains a current PPT/source-deck chart pattern while keeping reconciliation and source-owner approval visible.

moduleDefinitions.title: Driver Diagnosis
moduleDefinitions.outputModeRationale: Interprets the current metric profile through governed M/D/S and Perceived Value rules rather than reproducing a single source slide.

moduleDefinitions.title: Demographic Diagnostic Boundary
moduleDefinitions.outputModeRationale: Shows the intended demographic diagnostic workflow and current boundary; it is not measured current-state segment evidence until official cuts are loaded.

moduleDefinitions.title: Leadership Questions
moduleDefinitions.outputModeRationale: Turns current-state source reads and Kate/V7 feedback into governed next questions and source-owner asks beyond the static PPT.

moduleDefinitions.title: Treatment Paths To Consider
moduleDefinitions.outputModeRationale: Uses the governed current diagnostic read and treatment library to suggest paths to test, without claiming a final business prescription.

moduleDefinitions.title: Source Readiness And Next Proof
moduleDefinitions.outputModeRationale: Converts current evidence gaps into source-owner handoff work and pilot-readiness actions beyond the current PPT deliverable.
